# Vibepreneur

> Vibepreneur helps professionals transform real-world experience into scalable solutions and brings them to market with structured go-to-market and growth systems built in.

## About

Vibepreneur is a platform for experienced professionals (consultants, operators, domain experts) who want to turn their expertise into software products or productised services. It provides AI-powered workflows that guide users from opportunity identification through to market launch and growth.

## Core Features

- Insight Engine: Analyses professional background to identify underserved market segments and score opportunities by demand, urgency, and personal fit.
- Solution Builder: Transforms opportunities into structured solution concepts with positioning, pricing, feature scope, and buyer journey.
- Positioning Engine: Defines competitive angles, value propositions, objection handling, and messaging for specific market segments.
- Go-to-Market: Generates executable launch plans with ideal customer profiles, channel strategy, outreach sequences, and content angles.
- Distribution: Builds multi-channel distribution with email sequences, social content, and partnership opportunities.
- Growth System: Post-launch momentum with traction experiments, conversion measurement, referral mechanics, and visibility strategies.

## Pricing

- Free: $0. 1 solution concept, basic positioning, opportunity assessment, community access.
- Pro: $29/month. 3 active solutions, full positioning and GTM workflows, distribution tools.
- Scale: $79/month. Unlimited solutions, advanced analytics, priority support, team collaboration.

## Target Audience

Mid-career professionals, consultants, and domain experts looking to transition from service delivery to product ownership. Typical users have 10+ years of industry experience and see recurring problems they could solve at scale.

## Contact
